ops.text: Item 3 APPLIED (user-authorized 2026-07-20 "make all the calls... make default all the things that are winners"): TRIAGE_LIMIT 400→300, REFINE_LIMIT 400→200 shipped as afddb77253884f56135fc3440e63acee3127a8c9 (ENRICH 200 and AUDIT 60 unchanged — the recommendation's own defaults). The 15M-opus/night conservative cap assumption stands until the operator supplies the real cap; RE-BASELINE UPWARD after the first v7 nightly pass produces measured cache-hit envelopes (the ledger's own note: post-item-2 the same budget supports ~440 triage rows — but that projection used the sonnet-measured 0.683x factor, so wait for real opus v7 envelopes rather than applying it blind). Concurrency call also made: DEFAULT_CONCURRENCY stays 8 — the deferred 429 sweep cannot produce a valid opus answer within the preserved ~$9 (a valid opus sweep costs ~$45+), so the measured-plausible default stands and backlog task 73b8deb2 remains the vehicle if a dedicated window/budget appears.
